'''Corva''' was a planet in [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector's]] [[Galaanus system|Galaan system]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] established a colony on the [[planet]] which was wiped out by [[clodhopper]]s which arrived in a grain shipment from [[Naboo]].<ref name="SoN" /> The clodhoppers ate all the vegetation on Corva as well as 87% of the colonists.<ref name="SoN" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The name Corva in ''Secrets of Naboo'' is ambiguously applied to this world, since the first paragraph in which it is mentioned simply calls it "a failed Republic colony in the Galaan System, Corva sector". The next paragraph reads "[t]he incident at Corva...". As such it is unclear whether the sector or the world (with the same name) is being referred to.

''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Galaanus system|Galaan system]], which Corva is in, at grid coordinate P-4.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-02-08 -->''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''
